name: Beef Tenderloin with Marsala
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces pancetta (Italian-dry-cured unsmoked bacon OR 2 ounces bacon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large skillet until melted.
2. Add pancetta or bacon and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove pancetta or bacon with a slotted spoon and reserve for serving; discard onion.
4. Place beef slices in the same skillet and pan-broil until brown on each side, about 3 minutes per side.
5. Season meat with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Add melted butter, Marsala wine, and stock to the skillet.
7. Lower heat and cook for an additional 2 minutes on each side, turning once to coat the slices evenly.
8. Remove meat from the skillet and place it on top of the reserved pancetta on a serving platter; keep warm.
9. Reduce sauce in a small pot over low heat until slightly thickened, about 2 to 3 minutes.
10. Pour the sauce over the meat and serve. Serves 6.
